title: Notification No.72/2010-Cus(NT),dt. 12.08.2010
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 72 / 2010-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 12th August, 2010. S.O . (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs (Imports), ICD, Patparganj, New Delhi to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- ( i) the Joint/AdditionalCommissioner of Customs,(Imports), ICD Tughlakabad, New Delhi; (ii) the Joint / Additional Commissioner of Customs (Import), Air Cargo Complex, New Delhi ; (iii) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs (Import), Jawaharlal New Customs House, Nhava Sheva, Post: Uran, District Raigad,Maharashtra, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Ripple Enterprises, 40, Saomi Nagar, New Delhi and others, issued vide, DRI /AZU/INV-11/2009 dated 31st May,2010 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F.No. 437/42/2010-Cus.IV] (Navraj Goyal) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
